title: Ubiquiti UACC-Rack-Panel-Brush-1U, rack mount OCD panel, 1U
category: Ubiquiti UACC-Rack-Panel-Brush-1U, rack mount OCD panel, 1U
description: Self-through brush blanking strip for easy cable routing from Ubiquiti to 19" data cabinets, with a height of 1U and gray color . Suitable for elegant blinding or covering of unused positions in the data switchboard and at the same time serves to extend the cables
